title: Hacker Menu
description: A simple, quick and efficient cheat menu for singleplayer
body:
### Finally v4!
> New feature the "Command page"
> run commands as the server (remember to add your username in the commands)
> can run any vanilla and maybe any modded commands, even /op!
> Don't abuse it to ruin the fun!
> Do to this new feature, the old features of "god tools" & "god armor" has been removed, along with the debug stick.
> Keybind still END


A simple mod that makes you have your own cheat menu.

Works singleplayer & multiplayer (If server and all clients both have the mod installed)

v4 now supports 1.21.1 using Neoforge.

I do NOT condone breaking of rules, cheating or ruining the experinece for others.



**Feature list**
- A nice'er looking GUI
- A whole Potion Effects Menu 
- Quick mine
- Infinite Saturation
- Insta Kill
- Night Vision
- Poseidon ( Potion effects for water )
- Invisibility
- A turn off all button ( Didn't add an individual off for each one of them, so all go at ones )
- Move xp level options
- 5 levels
- 10 levels
- 50 levels
- Max level ( The max number minecraft can handle before resetting/breaking )
- god tools ( Now it isn't a stick anymore)
- god armor
- debug stick



Remeber to have fun and don't ruin it for others!


> Fabric Verson requires: Fabric API (Still only running on v2 at max, not updates planned)
> 
> Forge Version has no extra requirements. 
> 
> Neoforge version has no extra requirements.



> ou may add this mod to any existing modpack, or a private server ONLY.
> You may NOT resell or reupload this mod to other websites.
> When you download, you agree to these terms._


**Check out my other mod [https://modrinth.com/mod/simplywands](https://modrinth.com/mod/simplywands)**
